title: sideritis ochroleuca subsp. antiatlantica
intro: Sideritis ochroleuca subsp. antiatlantica, also known as the Anti-Atlantic Mountain tea or Anti-Atlantic White Sideritis, is a subspecies of the Sideritis ochroleuca plant, a type of mountain tea native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sideritis ochroleuca subsp. antiatlantica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
